events.title: Pirate Raid Incoming
events.description: Scouts report a pirate raid heading for your position. They outnumber you but their equipment is jury-rigged and poorly maintained.

outcome.message: You drive off the pirates after a sharp engagement. Some personnel sustain minor injuries.
The pirates take your payment and withdraw, though your standing with the locals suffers.

events.title: Supply Shipment Delayed
events.description: Your scheduled supply shipment has been delayed due to 'administrative complications' at the orbital depot.

outcome.message: The shipment arrives a week late. Your techs grumble about the delay.
A few well-placed C-Bills grease the wheels. Your shipment arrives on schedule.

events.title: Faction Requests Assistance
events.description: A nearby faction representative contacts you with an urgent request: they need armed support for a 'security situation' at one of their outposts.

outcome.message: Your intervention is a success. The faction praises your professionalism.
The faction representative is disappointed but understands your position.

events.title: Personnel Dispute
events.description: A heated argument has broken out between two senior members of your staff. The rest of the crew is taking sides, and morale is suffering.

outcome.message: You listen to both sides and broker a compromise. The crew respects your leadership.
Separating the involved parties cools tensions, though the underlying issue remains unresolved.

events.title: Lucky Salvage Find
events.description: While reviewing local salvage listings, you spot an underpriced lot that contains valuable Star League-era components.

outcome.message: You acquire the salvage at a steal. The components are worth a small fortune.

events.title: Mech Component Failure
events.description: One of your BattleMechs suffers a critical myomer bundle failure during routine maintenance.

outcome.message: The part arrives and your techs get the 'Mech operational again.
You pull a part from another 'Mech, leaving it inoperative. The crew is unhappy with the makeshift solution.

events.title: Faction Envoy Arrives
events.description: A diplomatic envoy from a major faction arrives unexpectedly, requesting a formal meeting. They seem to be evaluating your company for a potential long-term contract.

outcome.message: The envoy is impressed by your professionalism.
The meeting is cordial but brief. The envoy departs with a neutral impression.
